creator: philip@FreeBSD.org
text:
As far as I can tell, the legacy IP proxy works fine for beefy21 and beefy22:

https://pkg-status.freebsd.org/beefy21/
https://pkg-status.freebsd.org/beefy22/

These are the two newest builders in Chicago.

With respect to the ordering on pkg-status and other feature requests ... I would love to help, but I don't have the bandwidth.

The code behind that page is here:

https://github.com/bdrewery/pkg-status.freebsd.org

It would be great if someone had time to look through some of the bug reports and feature requests.  I'm happy to test / deploy them on the cluster when they materialise.  I believe the code on GitHub is exactly what's running on pkg-status.freebsd.org.
